Interface Documentable

All Known Subinterfaces:
AddonModule.ModuleOrigin, BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event<E>, DefaultFunction<T>, DefaultSyntaxInfos.Expression<E,R>, DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure<E>, Documentation, DocumentationDocumentable, EventValue<E,V>, Experiment, Function<T>, Origin, Origin.AddonOrigin, Origin.ClassOrigin, Parameter<T>, SyntaxInfo<E>, SyntaxRegistry
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnyInfo, AudienceClassInfo, BlockClassInfo, ClassInfo, ClassInfo.Usage, ContainerEntryData, EntityClassInfo, EntryData, EntryValidator, EnumClassInfo, Events, Events.LegacyEvents, ExperimentData, ExperimentRegistry, ExpressionEntryData, ExpressionInfo, Feature, Function, FunctionRegistry, InventoryClassInfo, ItemStackClassInfo, ItemTypeClassInfo, JavaFunction, KeyValueEntryData, LiteralEntryData, LocationClassInfo, NameableClassInfo, OfflinePlayerClassInfo, Parameter, Parameter.Modifier.RangedModifier, PlayerClassInfo, Property, Property.RelatedProperty, PropertyRegistry, QuaternionClassInfo, QueueClassInfo, RegistryClassInfo, ScriptClassInfo, ScriptFunction, ScriptParameter, SectionEntryData, SimpleJavaFunction, SkriptEventInfo, SkriptEventInfo.ModernSkriptEventInfo, SlotClassInfo, StructureInfo, SyntaxElementInfo, TestFeatures, TextComponentClassInfo, TriggerEntryData, VariableStringEntryData, VectorClassInfo
public interface Documentable
Describes something that can be written to a DocumentationAdapter.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    canWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
     
    default void
    postWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
    Called immediately after the write(DocumentationAdapter) process.
    default void
    preWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
    Called immediately before the write(DocumentationAdapter) process.
    void
    write(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
    Writes information about this object to an adapter.

  • Method Details

    • canWrite

      default boolean canWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter to be written to.
      Returns:
      Whether information about this object is able to be written to adapter.

    • preWrite

      default void preWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Called immediately before the write(DocumentationAdapter) process.
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter to be written to.

    • write

      void write(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Writes information about this object to an adapter.
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter to write to.

    • postWrite

      default void postWrite(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Called immediately after the write(DocumentationAdapter) process.
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter that was written to.
